κ : ℕ
inst✝¹³ : NeZero κ
L : Type

inst✝⁸ : SelectableType L
K : Type

inst✝⁶ : Fintype K
inst✝⁵ : DecidableEq K

hF₂ : Fact (Fintype.card K = 2)
inst✝⁴ : Algebra K L
β : Basis (Fin (2 ^ κ)) K L
h_β₀_eq_1 : Fact (β 0 = 1)
ℓ ℓ' 𝓡 ϑ γ_repetitions : ℕ
inst✝³ : NeZero ℓ
inst✝² : NeZero ℓ'
inst✝¹ : NeZero 𝓡
inst✝ : NeZero ϑ

h_l : ℓ = ℓ' + κ
𝓑 : Fin 2 ↪ L

σ : Type
init : ProbComp σ
impl : QueryImpl []ₒ (StateT σ ProbComp)
outerStmtIn :
  Statement (RingSwitchingBaseContext κ L K ℓ) 0 ×
    ((i : Fin (toOutCodewordsCount ℓ' ϑ 0)) → OracleStatement K (⇑β) ϑ 0 i)
outerWitIn : SumcheckWitness L ℓ' 0
innerStmtOut :
  Statement (RingSwitchingBaseContext κ L K ℓ) (Fin.last ℓ') ×
    ((i : Fin (toOutCodewordsCount ℓ' ϑ (Fin.last ℓ'))) → OracleStatement K (⇑β) ϑ (Fin.last ℓ') i)
innerWitOut : Witness K (⇑β) (Fin.last ℓ')
compat :
  Reduction.compatContext
    (OracleContext.Lens.toContext
      (Binius.FRIBinius.CoreInteractionPhase.sumcheckFoldCtxLens κ L inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ K inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶
        h_Fq_char_prime hF₂ inst✝⁴ β ℓ ℓ' 𝓡 ϑ inst✝² inst✝ h_ℓ_add_R_rate h_l))
    (CoreInteraction.sumcheckFoldOracleReduction K ⇑β).toReduction (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) (innerStmtOut, innerWitOut)
⊢ (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) ∈
      sumcheckRoundRelation κ L K (booleanHypercubeBasis κ L K β) ℓ ℓ' h_l
        (BinaryBasefoldAbstractOStmtIn κ L K β ℓ' 𝓡 ϑ h_ℓ_add_R_rate) 0 →
    (innerStmtOut, innerWitOut) ∈ roundRelation K (⇑β) (Fin.last ℓ') →
      ((OracleContext.Lens.toContext

                    h_Fq_char_prime hF₂ inst✝⁴ β ℓ ℓ' 𝓡 ϑ inst✝² inst✝ h_ℓ_add_R_rate h_l)).stmt.lift
            outerStmtIn innerStmtOut,
          (OracleContext.Lens.toContext
                  (Binius.FRIBinius.CoreInteractionPhase.sumcheckFoldCtxLens κ L inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ K inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶
                    h_Fq_char_prime hF₂ inst✝⁴ β ℓ ℓ' 𝓡 ϑ inst✝² inst✝ h_ℓ_add_R_rate h_l)).wit.lift
            (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) (innerStmtOut, innerWitOut)) ∈
        roundRelation K (⇑β) (Fin.last ℓ')
